typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	format: 'table',
	staged:false) ~> OLEDBSource
OLEDBSource sink(input(
		ECMREVLEVEL as string,
		STORNO_RU as integer,
		INVOICEID as string,
		VOUCHERPHYSICAL as string,
		INTERCOMPANYINVENTDIMTRANSFERRED as integer,
		PROJADJUSTREFID as string,
		SEMPREVSTATUSRECEIPT as integer,
		SEMPPVAMOUNTPHYSICAL as integer,
		DATESTATUS as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		TRANSCHILDREFID as string,
		PROJID as string,
		QTY as integer,
		INVENTTRANSORIGINDELIVERY_RU as long,
		VALUEOPEN as integer,
		PARTITION as long,
		SEMCONSIGNEDREFERENCE as string,
		STATUSRECEIPT as integer,
		PDSCWQTY as integer,
		COSTAMOUNTSETTLED as integer,
		QTYSETTLED as integer,
		QTYSETTLEDSECCUR_RU as integer,
		PICKINGROUTEID as string,
		RECID as long,
		REVENUEAMOUNTPHYSICAL as integer,
		ECMREVLEVELDRAWING as string,
		VALUEOPENSECCUR_RU as integer,
		INVENTTRANSORIGIN as long,
		PACKINGSLIPRETURNED as integer,
		ADEC_MARK as integer,
		ITEMID as string,
		ACTIVITYNUMBER as string,
		DATECLOSEDSECCUR_RU as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ADEC_OVERHEADAMOUNTPHYSICAL as integer,
		SEMINVENTBATCHID as string,
		COSTAMOUNTSETTLEDSECCUR_RU as integer,
		STATUSISSUE as integer,
		INVENTTRANSORIGINTRANSIT_RU as long,
		TAXAMOUNTPHYSICAL as integer,
		INVENTDIMID as string,
		TIMEEXPECTED as integer,
		PDSCWSETTLED as integer,
		STORNOPHYSICAL_RU as integer,
		COSTAMOUNTADJUSTMENT as integer,
		PROJCATEGORYID as string,
		DATEINVENT as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ADEC_UNITSALESPRICE as integer,
		COSTAMOUNTSECCURADJUSTMENT_RU as integer,
		COSTAMOUNTOPERATIONS as integer,
		COSTAMOUNTSECCURPHYSICAL_RU as integer,
		COSTAMOUNTPHYSICAL as integer,
		SEMDATECODE as string,
		DATAAREAID as string,
		INVENTDIMIDSALES_RU as string,
		DATEFINANCIAL as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		COSTAMOUNTPOSTED as integer,
		SHIPPINGDATECONFIRMED as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		DATECLOSED as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ADEC_OVERHEADPERCENT as integer,
		COSTAMOUNTSECCURPOSTED_RU as integer,
		COSTAMOUNTSTDSECCUR_RU as integer,
		INVOICERETURNED as integer,
		INVENTDIMFIXED as integer,
		INVENTTRANSORIGINSALES_RU as long,
		CURRENCYCODE as string,
		GROUPREFID_RU as string,
		RECVERSION as integer,
		GROUPREFTYPE_RU as integer,
		SHIPPINGDATEREQUESTED as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		DATEEXPECTED as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		RETURNINVENTTRANSORIGIN as long,
		MARKINGREFINVENTTRANSORIGIN as long,
		VOUCHER as string,
		DATEPHYSICAL as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		TRANSCHILDTYPE as integer,
		PACKINGSLIPID as string,
		COSTAMOUNTSTD as integer,
		EBCENGTRIAL as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		ECMREVLEVEL,
		STORNO_RU,
		INVOICEID,
		VOUCHERPHYSICAL,
		INTERCOMPANYINVENTDIMTRANSFERRED,
		PROJADJUSTREFID,
		SEMPREVSTATUSRECEIPT,
		SEMPPVAMOUNTPHYSICAL,
		DATESTATUS,
		TRANSCHILDREFID,
		PROJID,
		QTY,
		INVENTTRANSORIGINDELIVERY_RU,
		VALUEOPEN,
		PARTITION,
		SEMCONSIGNEDREFERENCE,
		STATUSRECEIPT,
		PDSCWQTY,
		COSTAMOUNTSETTLED,
		QTYSETTLED,
		QTYSETTLEDSECCUR_RU,
		PICKINGROUTEID,
		RECID,
		REVENUEAMOUNTPHYSICAL,
		ECMREVLEVELDRAWING,
		VALUEOPENSECCUR_RU,
		INVENTTRANSORIGIN,
		PACKINGSLIPRETURNED,
		ADEC_MARK,
		ITEMID,
		ACTIVITYNUMBER,
		DATECLOSEDSECCUR_RU,
		ADEC_OVERHEADAMOUNTPHYSICAL,
		SEMINVENTBATCHID,
		COSTAMOUNTSETTLEDSECCUR_RU,
		STATUSISSUE,
		INVENTTRANSORIGINTRANSIT_RU,
		TAXAMOUNTPHYSICAL,
		INVENTDIMID,
		TIMEEXPECTED,
		PDSCWSETTLED,
		STORNOPHYSICAL_RU,
		COSTAMOUNTADJUSTMENT,
		PROJCATEGORYID,
		DATEINVENT,
		ADEC_UNITSALESPRICE,
		COSTAMOUNTSECCURADJUSTMENT_RU,
		COSTAMOUNTOPERATIONS,
		COSTAMOUNTSECCURPHYSICAL_RU,
		COSTAMOUNTPHYSICAL,
		SEMDATECODE,
		DATAAREAID,
		INVENTDIMIDSALES_RU,
		DATEFINANCIAL,
		COSTAMOUNTPOSTED,
		SHIPPINGDATECONFIRMED,
		DATECLOSED,
		ADEC_OVERHEADPERCENT,
		COSTAMOUNTSECCURPOSTED_RU,
		COSTAMOUNTSTDSECCUR_RU,
		INVOICERETURNED,
		INVENTDIMFIXED,
		INVENTTRANSORIGINSALES_RU,
		CURRENCYCODE,
		GROUPREFID_RU,
		RECVERSION,
		GROUPREFTYPE_RU,
		SHIPPINGDATEREQUESTED,
		DATEEXPECTED,
		RETURNINVENTTRANSORIGIN,
		MARKINGREFINVENTTRANSORIGIN,
		VOUCHER,
		DATEPHYSICAL,
		TRANSCHILDTYPE,
		PACKINGSLIPID,
		COSTAMOUNTSTD,
		EBCENGTRIAL)) ~> OLEDBDestination
